code:
%%{Groupware_WikiPage}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Groupware_IssueTracker] --> IDLE

    IDLE --> VALIDATING: swap_expert(Groupware_SprintBacklog)

    VALIDATING --> PREPARING: validation passed
    VALIDATING --> FAILED: validation failed

    PREPARING --> EXECUTING: checkpoint created
    PREPARING --> FAILED: load failed

    EXECUTING --> COMMITTING: atomic swap done
    EXECUTING --> ROLLING_BACK: swap failed

    COMMITTING --> IDLE: cleanup done

    FAILED --> ROLLING_BACK: auto-rollback

    ROLLING_BACK --> IDLE: restored

    note right of VALIDATING
        Check:
        • Architecture match
        • Tensor shapes
        • Data types
    end note

    note right of PREPARING
        Actions:
        • Load new weights
        • Create checkpoint
        • Allocate memory
    end note

    note right of EXECUTING
        ACID Atomic:
        • Lock acquired
        • Pointer swap
        • Lock released
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个模型热更新的状态机。核心场景是从IssueTracker触发，经过验证、准备、执行、提交这几个阶段，失败的话要能自动回滚。
明白了，起点是IssueTracker到IDLE状态。VALIDATING之后如果验证失败直接到FAILED状态对吗？还有PREPARING阶段如果加载失败也要走失败分支？
对，VALIDATING有两条出边：validation passed到PREPARING，validation failed到FAILED。PREPARING也是，checkpoint created才能进EXECUTING，load failed就进FAILED。
好，主干画好了。EXECUTING之后atomic swap done到COMMITTING，swap failed的话走ROLLING_BACK。另外FAILED状态需要能自动触发回滚吗？
需要，FAILED要有auto-rollback到ROLLING_BACK。ROLLING_BACK恢复完成后回到IDLE。COMMITTING清理完也回到IDLE。对了，三个关键状态要加注释说明细节。
加上了。VALIDATING旁边我写了检查项：架构匹配、Tensor形状、数据类型。PREPARING是加载权重、创建检查点、分配内存。这样对吗？
PREPARING的注释里「加载权重」改成「Load new weights」保持术语一致。还有EXECUTING的注释要强调ACID原子性：获取锁、指针交换、释放锁。
已修正，EXECUTING的注释标题是「ACID Atomic」，三条子项也补全了。整个状态机从IssueTracker触发，经过验证-准备-执行-提交或回滚，最终都回到IDLE，闭环完成。
